title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama; chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers to interact with the Ollama local server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration letting you use Ollama models as LLMs, chat, or embedding endpoints in LangChain pipelines.

title: llama-index-integrations-llms-ollama
summary: LlamaIndex LLM and embedding connectors for Ollama; build RAG apps with local models.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich chat WebUI for Ollama (now renamed “Open WebUI”)—Markdown, code highlighting, model manager, RAG uploads.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper that adds conversation history, prompt templates, and markdown rendering on top of ollama.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code suggestions.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Clean React chatbot frontend that talks to your local Ollama instance over REST.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain to chat with your PDFs offline.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Telegram bot that forwards messages to a local Ollama instance and streams replies back to users.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot slash-command integration for chatting with Ollama models privately on your server.

title: ollama-nim-client
summary: Pure Nim client library for Ollama’s REST API; chat, generate, pull models natively in Nim.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed async bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin SDK for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and embedding support.

title: ollama-curl
summary: Official API documentation showing how to use Ollama with plain curl or any HTTP client.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack NLP pipelines.

title: ollama-model-registry
summary: Docs explaining how to create, publish, and share custom Modelfiles in the Ollama ecosystem.

title: ollama-dagger-module
summary: Dagger CI module that spins up Ollama as a service container for testing LLM workflows in pipelines.

title: ollama-huggingface-downloader
summary: Utility script to convert and import any Hugging Face GGUF model into Ollama with one command.
